# services.conky

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.conky`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.conky.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Conky, a light-weight system monitor. |
| `services.conky.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Configuration used by the Conky daemon. Check <https://github.com/brndnmtthws/conky/wiki/Configurations> for options. If not set, the default configuration, as described by {command}`conky --print-config`, will be used. |
| `services.conky.package` | `package` | The conky package to use. |
